flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cankdeska Cikana Community College fell 57% between 2006 and 2009 (26.3% → 11.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cankdeska Cikana Community College fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (70.0% → 43.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Cankdeska Cikana Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (9.1% vs 16.4%).
